name: AICTE-INAE Travel Grant Scheme For Engineering Students From AICTE Approved Engineering College/Institution
benefit_description: Financial Support The reimbursement of 100% Registration Fee, Visa Fee including travel insurance up to ₹5000. The reimbursement of 50% of the actual Airfare or discounted /concessional air tickets along with local transport from the airport to the venue for presentation, in case not claimed from an
details: A Travel Grant Scheme by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE) and by the Indian National Academy of Engineering (INAE), for the students from AICTE approved Engineering College/institutions. The scheme aims at enhancing the quality of engineering education in the country and to inculcate a culture of research amongst the students. The scheme aims to provide partial travel assistance and registration fees to Bachelors's and Masters's Level engineering students for presenting a re
eligibility_text: The applicant must EITHER be a Pre-final/final year student of B.E./B.Tech, OR Integrated M.Tech and first/second-year student of M.E./M. Tech, OR Students pursuing MS Research, M.Sc. in Engineering, dual degree B.Tech and M.Tech or any degree with a minimum of 4 years of engineering studies. The applicant must be pursuing the degree course from an AICTE-approved Engineering Institution. The appli
